mapper.select: select c.id as id, c.name as name, c.description as description, c.position as position, c.create_time as create_time, coalesce(cnt.post_count, 0) as post_count from category c left join ( select category_id, count(*) as post_count from discuss_post where status != 2 and category_id is not null group by category_id ) cnt on c.id = cnt.category_id order by c.position asc, c.id asc
